svg.title: Three-tier architecture: Vercel edge, VPS on Cloudeka Jakarta, and managed services
svg.desc: Next.js on Vercel connects to a NestJS API and BullMQ workers on an Ubuntu VPS, which talk to Supabase Postgres, Upstash Redis, and NVIDIA NIM.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Vercel edge / Next.js layer of this architecture')
sendPrompt('Explain the NestJS API service and its routes')
sendPrompt('Explain the Upstash Redis / BullMQ queue role')
sendPrompt('Explain the NVIDIA NIM LLM layer and the 9 agents')
sendPrompt('Explain the Supabase Postgres data layer')
